title.zh_CN: AI 助手词库配置文件 (Assistant Lexicon)

description.zh_CN: 此文件定义了 AI 助手本地意图解析器所使用的关键词词库。当 AI 大模型不可用（网络断开或 API 未配置）时，助手会使用此文件中的关键词来匹配玩家的输入文本，推断意图并执行操作。
description.en_US: This file defines the keyword lexicon used by the AI assistant's local intent parser. When the AI model is unavailable (network down or API not configured), the assistant uses keywords from this file to match player input text, infer intent, and execute actions.

howToUse.zh_CN: 修改指南：每个字段都是一个字符串数组，用于匹配玩家输入的文本。匹配是大小写敏感的。你可以添加、删除或修改任何数组中的词条来定制助手的行为。修改后无需重启游戏，使用 /admassistant reload 命令即可热重载。
howToUse.en_US: Usage: Each field is a string array used to match player input text. Matching is case-sensitive. You can add, remove, or modify entries in any array to customize the assistant's behavior. No game restart needed - use /admassistant reload to hot-reload.

commonWords.zh_CN: 常用语气词 — 在文本归一化时被移除的无意义词
commonWords.en_US: Common filler words — removed during text normalization

modalParticles.zh_CN: 语气助词 — 中文句末语气词，归一化时移除
modalParticles.en_US: Modal particles — Chinese sentence-final particles, removed during normalization

edgePunctuationRegex.zh_CN: 边缘标点正则 — 匹配文本开头和结尾的标点符号（含中英文），用于去除标点
edgePunctuationRegex.en_US: Edge punctuation regex — matches punctuation at the start and end of text (Chinese and English), used for stripping

chineseNumbers.zh_CN: 中文数字 — 一至十，用于解析数量描述
chineseNumbers.en_US: Chinese numerals — one to ten, used for parsing quantity descriptions

optionPrefixes.zh_CN: 选项前缀 — 如'第1个'中的'第'

optionSuffixes.zh_CN: 选项后缀 — 如'第1个'中的'个'

amountUnits.zh_CN: 数量单位 — 组、个、件、根、桶、mb等
amountUnits.en_US: Amount units — stack, piece, item, stick, bucket, mb, etc.

groupAmountWords.zh_CN: 整组数量词 — 如'一组'=64个
groupAmountWords.en_US: Full group amount words — e.g. '一组' = 64 items

halfGroupAmountWords.zh_CN: 半组数量词 — 如'半组'=32个
halfGroupAmountWords.en_US: Half group amount words — e.g. '半组' = 32 items

bucketAmountUnits.zh_CN: 桶单位 — 用于流体数量解析
bucketAmountUnits.en_US: Bucket units — for fluid amount parsing

cancelWords.zh_CN: 取消关键词 — 触发取消当前操作
cancelWords.en_US: Cancel keywords — trigger cancellation of current operation

planStripWords.zh_CN: 计划剥离词 — 从创建计划的文本中移除的前缀词
planStripWords.en_US: Plan strip words — prefix words removed from plan creation text

confirmWords.zh_CN: 确认关键词 — 用于确认选择候选项
confirmWords.en_US: Confirmation keywords — for confirming candidate selection

batchSeparators.zh_CN: 批量分隔符 — 用于解析多个物品/请求
batchSeparators.en_US: Batch separators — for parsing multiple items/requests

withdrawStrongWords.zh_CN: 取出强关键词 — 触发从AE2取出物品
withdrawStrongWords.en_US: Strong withdraw keywords — trigger AE2 item withdrawal

withdrawStripWords.zh_CN: 取出剥离词 — 从取出请求文本中移除的辅助词
withdrawStripWords.en_US: Withdraw strip words — auxiliary words removed from withdrawal request text

craftContextWords.zh_CN: 合成上下文关键词 — 激活合成上下文的词
craftContextWords.en_US: Craft context keywords — words that activate crafting context

storageContextWords.zh_CN: 存储上下文关键词 — 激活存储上下文的词
storageContextWords.en_US: Storage context keywords — words that activate storage context

orderStrongWords.zh_CN: 下单强关键词 — 触发AE2合成下单
orderStrongWords.en_US: Strong order keywords — trigger AE2 crafting order

ambiguousWeakWords.zh_CN: 模糊弱意图词 — 当意图不清时用作fallback线索
ambiguousWeakWords.en_US: Ambiguous weak intent words — used as fallback clues when intent is unclear

orderWeakWords.zh_CN: 下单弱关键词 — 配合上下文判断是否为合成意图
orderWeakWords.en_US: Weak order keywords — used with context to determine crafting intent

orderStripWords.zh_CN: 下单剥离词 — 从合成请求文本中移除的辅助词
orderStripWords.en_US: Order strip words — auxiliary words removed from crafting request text

confirmStripWords.zh_CN: 确认剥离词 — 从确认文本中移除的辅助词
confirmStripWords.en_US: Confirm strip words — auxiliary words removed from confirmation text

candidateAmountBlockWords.zh_CN: 候选数量阻断词 — 当这些词出现时不自动填充数量
candidateAmountBlockWords.en_US: Candidate amount block words — when present, don't auto-fill amount

testStorageWords.zh_CN: 测试存储关键词 — 用于测试匹配
testStorageWords.en_US: Test storage keywords — for test matching

testRecipeWords.zh_CN: 测试配方关键词 — 用于测试匹配
testRecipeWords.en_US: Test recipe keywords — for test matching

fluidScopeWords.zh_CN: 流体范围词 — 限定查询范围为流体
fluidScopeWords.en_US: Fluid scope words — limit query scope to fluids

itemScopeWords.zh_CN: 物品范围词 — 限定查询范围为物品
itemScopeWords.en_US: Item scope words — limit query scope to items

queryStripWords.zh_CN: 查询剥离词 — 从查询文本中移除的语气/前缀词
queryStripWords.en_US: Query strip words — filler/prefix words removed from query text

recipeStripWords.zh_CN: 配方剥离词 — 从配方查询文本中移除的辅助词
recipeStripWords.en_US: Recipe strip words — auxiliary words removed from recipe query text

storageStripWords.zh_CN: 存储剥离词 — 从存储查询文本中移除的辅助词
storageStripWords.en_US: Storage strip words — auxiliary words removed from storage query text

timePointWords.zh_CN: 时间点词语 — 如'几点'中的'点'
timePointWords.en_US: Time point words — e.g. '点' in '几点'

timeStripWords.zh_CN: 时间剥离词 — 从时间计划文本中移除的辅助词
timeStripWords.en_US: Time strip words — auxiliary words removed from time plan text

messages.zh_CN: 系统消息模板 — AI助手在查询/操作后返回给玩家的消息文本。key是消息标识符，value是消息内容。支持 \n 换行。
messages.en_US: System message templates — text messages returned to players after queries/operations. Key is the message identifier, value is the message content. Supports \n for newlines.

messages.storage.noLink: 查询失败：附近没有 Advance Storage Link。
messages.storage.noGrid: 查询失败：AE2 存储网络不可用。
messages.storage.capacityUnknown: 容量/占用百分比：当前 AE2 适配器暂时无法读取，这里返回已读取到的数量统计。
messages.storage.noMatchPrefix: 没有在 AE2 存储里找到：
messages.wireless.noApi: 无线电网查询未找到兼容的 GTNH/TecTech API，请查看调试日志确认模组版本暴露的方法名。
messages.wireless.ioUnavailable: 输入/输出速率：API 未暴露。
messages.wireless.steam.noApi: 无线蒸汽查询未找到兼容的 ScienceNotLeisure API，请查看调试日志确认模组版本暴露的方法名。
